The '''Krath dire sword''' was a [[Sword/Legends|weapon]] of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] Cult which used metal weaved with [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis ore]]. These weapons were only given to the most loyal warriors.

Other Krath weaponry include the [[Krath blood blade|blood blade]], the [[Krath war blade|war blade]], and the [[Krath Double Sword|double sword]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
